ddls:
CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class (e.g., Warrior, Wizard, Archer, Cleric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Categorization of the class type */,
  "playstyle" TEXT /* Description of the playstyle */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the class icon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class the skill belongs to */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* Type of skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost to use the skill */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown time in seconds */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage */,
  "healing_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of healing provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class the equipment belongs to */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the equipment */,
  "base_defense" INTEGER /* Base defense provided by the equipment */,
  "base_attack" INTEGER /* Base attack provided by the equipment */,
  "strength_bonus" INTEGER /* Strength bonus provided by the equipment */,
  "constitution_bonus" INTEGER /* Constitution bonus provided by the equipment */,
  "intelligence_bonus" INTEGER /* Intelligence bonus provided by the equipment */,
  "dexterity_bonus" INTEGER /* Dexterity bonus provided by the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class the quest belongs to */,
  "quest_type" TEXT /* Type of quest */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to start the quest */,
  "reward_xp" INTEGER /* XP rewarded upon completion */,
  "reward_gold" INTEGER /* Gold rewarded upon completion */,
  "reward_items" TEXT /* JSON array of items rewarded upon completion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, game designer, QA tester) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
